name: Neumora Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company founded to confront the greatest medical challenges of our generation by bringing forward the next generation of novel therapies with brain-penetrant chemistry that offer improved treatment outcomes and quality of life for patients. We are advancing a Phase 3 program for navacaprant, a novel once-daily oral kappa opioid receptor (KOR) antagonist that is being developed for the treatment of major depressive disorder (MDD). We are also advancing NMRA-511 for the treatment of agitation associated with dementia due to Alzheimer's disease, NMRA-898 for the treatment of schizophrenia, and NMRA-215 for the treatment of obesity.
sellsTo: patients with agitation associated with Alzheimer's disease

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company founded to confront the greatest medical challenges of our generation by bringing forward the next generation of novel therapies with brain-penetrant chemistry that offer improved treatment outcomes and quality of life for patients.

catalysts.sentence: We expect several updates from these programs throughout 2026, including to report Phase 3 KOASTAL-2 and -3 topline data in the second quarter of 2026.
We expect several updates from these programs throughout 2026, including ... report MAD extension data with NMRA-511 in the second half of 2026.
We expect several updates from these programs throughout 2026, including ... to report multiple ascending dose (MAD) data with NMRA-898 in the second half of 2026.
